title: Flashback or Dream
wikitext:
[]: Flashback or Dream?             Quote Post by Mongoosedog » Mon Aug 24, 2009 9:56 pm I'm talking about the scene in EoE where Shinji and Asuka are fighting and Shinji starts strangling her. i originally thought it was just a hypothetical situation, but then when i was rewatching the series last week in one episode (don't remember which) you here Asuka and Shinji arguing with Asuka saying "don't say rubbish like that, idiot!" (or something like that) and Shinji says "i'm telling you Kaji is dead!". and you hear something breaking, sounds the same as the coffee pot breaking in EoE and Asuka is wearing the same clothes, which i'm pretty sure are different from what she normally wears in the series. this made me think it really happened and was a flashback. So i'm not 100% sure, just wanted to know your opinions

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Mon Aug 24, 2009 10:24 pm Its a dream/mind fuck. I imagine that scene came up because that was the last idono conigzant or consious encounter Shinji had with Asuka before the mindrape, or maybe after; you know what im saying. It was also probably reflecting what Asuka said to him in there, that all he does is hurt her.

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Mon Aug 24, 2009 10:38 pm I think it's Shinji imagining what he wanted to do, but didn't have the balls to do. I mean, come on, everyone does this. We replay situations in our head where someone messes with us and we like to imagine we gave them what they deserved. I think Asuka really did push Shinji and break a coffe pot, but Shinji only imagines himself throwing a tantrum, flipping the table and strangling Asuka.

[]:             Quote Post by Mongoosedog » Mon Aug 24, 2009 10:43 pm @mug hmm that's quite possible. also it shows a quick shot of Naoko strangling Rei1, is that to show that at that point Shinji was jealous of Asuka or just hated her that much at that point in time or something else?

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Mon Aug 24, 2009 10:54 pm It's Shinji's dream, but his mind is really connected somehow with those of Misato, Asuka et al. Shinji wouldn't know that Misato and Kaji spent a whole week in college having sex, but the viewer knows that from episode 21. Likewise with Asuka; the Asuka in Shinji's mind probably wouldn't say lines like "If you can't be all mine, then I don't need you!"

[]:             Quote Post by Mongoosedog » Mon Aug 24, 2009 11:09 pm i know most, if not, all of it is a dream but because of the connections with that one particular part it seemed quite possible it was a flash back as Shinji was actually there with Asuka during that situation (up to the coffee pot breaking part at least)

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Aug 24, 2009 11:42 pm More on this subject here: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=3806

[]:             Quote Post by Mongoosedog » Mon Aug 24, 2009 11:43 pm ah, thanks

[]: Re: Flashback or Dream?             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Aug 25, 2009 12:56 am Mongoosedog wrote: I'm talking about the scene in EoE where Shinji and Asuka are fighting and Shinji starts strangling her

[]:             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Fri Aug 28, 2009 1:24 am Telling her "Kaji's dead!" didn't seem like a metaphorical murder akin to choking her. The core mystery is whether it was Shinji and Asuka comingling in a joined pre-instrumentality haze, or Shinji choking his own personal image of Asuka. I'm inclined to think it's the former.

[]:             Quote Post by Desty_Nova » Fri Aug 28, 2009 6:20 am I don't think it's a flashback. Asuka would beat the shit out of Shinji if he tried that.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Aug 28, 2009 5:09 pm It's metaphysical happening, similar to what we see in EoTV, so you can say it's "dream-like" in that sense. Like Tines said, this is one of the twisted replays of actual events in the series. And yes, it's the real Shinji/Asuka/etc. How else would Asuka know about Shinji fapping by her bedside as well as those memories we see before the Kaji/Misato sexathon college flashback if it's not really them? BUT I still can't wrap my head around WHY Asuka doesn't fight back during the kitchen scene compared to when she "fights back" with the caress on the LCL Sea beach. My only guess on that matter is maybe it has to do with the process of 3rd Impact starting, but that still doesn't answer the why with that. EDIT: In that ancient thread, Reichu answers my current question: :P ANF Reichu post wrote: As for why she lets Shinji strangle her -- well, she's already dead, so what does it matter?

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Fri Aug 28, 2009 6:46 pm On the whole real/dream thing, I must point out that if it makes more sense for a dream Asuka to know about the jerk off than the real one, as one has Shinji's memories automatically and the other requires GNR to give them to her. As for Shinji knowing Misato's one-week deal, GNR might have used her magic powers to show him the memories when he started remembering Misato. Just my own thoughts.

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Fri Aug 28, 2009 9:28 pm I always felt it was a dream and not a flashback. Asuka seem to deliberately cruel, even for her, for it to have really happened. Also since it happened right before Shinji gave into 3rd impact, I always saw it as a visible excuse for Shinji to decided to go along with what was happening. Because he was rebuffed so cruelty in the dream it gave him a reason to turn his back on all of humanity.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Aug 28, 2009 11:18 pm There was a really obnoxious thread with Wolfy-kun and walls of text about this subject. What happened to that? The newbies should be tortured.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Aug 29, 2009 2:36 am Legendary wrote: it makes more sense for a dream Asuka to know about the jerk off than the real one...

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Sat Aug 29, 2009 3:01 am Except the moment in question is the one *before* Shinji triggers Instrumentality. Everything that happens after tanging is unquestionably one mind. What happened when Shinji was talking to GNR? That's a bit debatable.

[]:             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Sat Aug 29, 2009 5:22 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: And yes, it's the real Shinji/Asuka/etc. How else would Asuka know about Shinji fapping by her bedside as well as those memories we see before the Kaji/Misato sexathon college flashback if it's not really them?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Aug 29, 2009 5:51 pm *Sigh* Everything from the sandbox scene to Shinji strangling Asuka is Pre-3rd Impact Instrumentality: Only a select few such as Misato, Ritsuko, Shinji and Asuka are part of the process because of Rei linking their minds/souls. 3rd Impact itself doesn't occur until Shinji strangles Asuka, and actual Instrumentality (In EoE that is, considering all of EoTV is Instrumentality) is the "breakup lines" sequence.

[]:             Quote Post by Mongoosedog » Sat Aug 29, 2009 6:08 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: And yes, it's the real Shinji/Asuka/etc. How else would Asuka know about Shinji fapping by her bedside as well as those memories we see before the Kaji/Misato sexathon college flashback if it's not really them?
